2026-27.formula: X

2026-27.name: Balance
2026-27.formula: previous month Balance amount - Car loan Installment

2026-27.name: CMRE
2026-27.formula: Cummulative CMRE of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: DA
2026-27.formula: Cummulative Variable DA of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: ERC PRBS
2026-27.formula: Cummulative erc_prbs of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: HRA
2026-27.formula: Cummulative HRA of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Incentive
2026-27.formula: PRP Payment

2026-27.name: Other (T)
2026-27.formula: Cummulative (Other Cafeteria+LFA Allowance-CA+Arrears other than April month+All Reimbursements+FDE without tax+Spectacles-WG Value Adjust-) of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Other Pay
2026-27.formula: Cummulative (Uniform Reimb+ vehicle Insurance Reimbursement) of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Other(NT)
2026-27.formula: Cummulative (Maintenance charge WG+1800) of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: PAY
2026-27.formula: Cummulative Basic Pay of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Prev.Yrs.
2026-27.formula: Arrears payments (Arr. Is the starting keyword)

2026-27.name: CPF
2026-27.formula: Cummulative CPF EEC of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: CSSS
2026-27.formula: Cummulative CSS SCHEME of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: EEC NPS
2026-27.formula: Cummulative NPS EEC of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Eec PRBS
2026-27.formula: Cummulative Emp PRBS contrib of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: erc_nps
2026-27.formula: Cummulative ERC NPS of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: erc_prbs
2026-27.formula: Cummulative ERC-PRBS of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: HCMRS sch
2026-27.formula: Cummulative HCMRS Ins Scheme of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: HRR
2026-27.formula: Cummulative HRR incl retro of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: I. Tax
2026-27.formula: Cummulative Income Tax of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: P. Tax
2026-27.formula: Cummulative Prof Tax of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Tax Incm
2026-27.formula: Tot Incm-Other(NT)

2026-27.name: Tot Incm
2026-27.formula: PAY+DA+HRA+CMRE+Other(T)+Other(NT)+Other Pay+Prev. Yrs.+Incentive+Hard Duty

2026-27.name: WG Rent
2026-27.formula: Cummulative White goods Rent of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Asset Tra
2026-27.formula: X

2026-27.name: Ded us 80
2026-27.formula: Cummulative of ERC NPS of that Financial year till date or 150000 (whichever is lower)

2026-27.name: Gross Sal
2026-27.formula: PAY+DA+HRA+Medical Allowance+Incentive+Cummulative Other Cafeteria till date+Int loan+Asset Tra+Car Insuranc+Uniform Reimb+FDE

2026-27.name: I.Tax&Sur
2026-27.formula: Cummulative of Income Tax of that Financial year till date

2026-27.name: Income
2026-27.formula: Gross sal - Std Dedn
